title: OncoConnect Project Initiated
content: Consortium kickoff meeting held. All partners confirmed participation and agreed on project timeline.
author: Kanser Savaşçıları Derneği

title: WP2 Survey Design Started
content: Fundacja Rakiety has begun drafting the patient needs assessment survey. Partners review deadline: June 10.
author: Fundacja Onkologiczna Rakiety

title: Ethics Framework Discussion
content: Universitat de Barcelona shared initial ethical AI assessment framework. Each partner to review local ethics requirements.
author: Universitat de Barcelona

title: Patient Advisory Board Call
content: First patient advisory board meeting scheduled for June 15. Two patient representatives from each country will participate.
author: Kanser Savaşçıları Derneği

title: Co-Creation Workshop Planning
content: Workshop methodology document shared. Mixed-methods approach confirmed: online surveys + in-person focus groups.
author: Fundacja Onkologiczna Rakiety
